title: SHC Magic Archery
description: Make your bows and crossbows magical
body:
Optifine Optional

This pack changes yours Bows and crossbows and all the arrows to look magical!

The Bows, crossbows and arrow items can glow in the dark without the needed optifine!

But if you use optifine the arrow entity gonna be able to glow too!


There's 2 version of the pack:

The normal version: Not require optifine to work, include magic arrows

Cit version of the pack: Require optifine to work, not include the magic arrows

For obtain the magic bow/crossbow you need to rename a bow/crossbow to:

-Magic Bow

-Magic Crossbow

Have a nice day!
